attributes.action: Start drilling for oil & gas in the North Sea again
attributes.additional_details: I believe continuing responsible North Sea production is essential for the UK’s energy security and economic stability.
attributes.background: Help the uk to be less reliant on other countries for it’s fuel & create jobs in the oil & gas industry.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make the most of our own natural resources. Allow companies to drill gas and oil
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065
